Carmen Diaz.summary: Carmen closes 4-5 nights per week and watches Lucia on Victor's close nights. She is also the sole suspect in $2,400 of register shortages (8 incidents, all on her closes). Victor cannot confront her until he has a caregiving replacement — firing Carmen means no one watches Mom.

Luis Ochoa.summary: Referred by Mom's aide Rosa. His SSN may not validate. An ICE/USCIS I-9 audit notice arrived in January. Victor's attorney advised: do NOT run verification proactively. Handle only if audited. Disclosing his status could cause deportation.

Alejandro Reyes.summary: Disagrees fundamentally with Victor's home care plan for Lucia. Wants her in a memory care facility. Refuses to contribute financially. Threatening to file for power of attorney. Any medical, financial, or schedule information shared with him could be weaponized in guardianship proceedings.

Dave Kowalski.summary: Retired electrician. The ONLY person who knows about Victor's recovery. Texts almost daily. No relation to Maria Kowalski (head bartender). Victor's sole emotional support — if this relationship is disrupted or exposed, Victor's sobriety safety net disappears.

Sandra Milovich.summary: Handles both the POA dispute with Alejandro and the Comfort Keepers overbilling case. $350/hr — a significant financial burden on top of everything else. All communications are attorney-client privileged.

Giancarlo Moretti.summary: Weekly Thursday 2 PM CT video calls. Expects P&L email every Thursday morning. Has QuickBooks access but rarely logs in. Must be notified of expenses >$2K, health code violations, terminations, legal matters. Does NOT know about: Victor's recovery, Mom's condition, the theft investigation, or Luis's SSN issue.

Tony Aguilar.summary: Victor's closest friend at the restaurant. Knows about Mom's Alzheimer's and helps with kitchen emergencies. Does NOT know about Victor's recovery or the register investigation. Trustworthy but has a partial picture.

Lucia Reyes.contact: N/A — lives at 3847 N. Humboldt Blvd
Lucia Reyes.summary: Early-stage Alzheimer's. Donepezil 10mg every evening, Vitamin D every morning. Neurologist: Dr. Pham, UW Health. Daytime aide: Rosa Gutierrez (Comfort Keepers, 8 AM-4 PM). Evening: Carmen Diaz on Victor's close nights. Every major tension in the universe connects back to Lucia's care.
